member.name: M:Prime.InitService.InitService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.InitService.IInitService
member.summary: Interface of InitService.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.SaveCurrentLocation(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Save current location from SCVars.SC_LOCN.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.GetSavedLocation(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get saved location value.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.SaveCurrentProductName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Save current product name from SCVars.SC_PACKAGE, SCVars.SC_DEVICE, SCVars.SC_REV, SCVars.SC_STEP, SCVars.SC_ENGID, SCVars.SC_FABID, SCVars.SC_SSPEC.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.GetSavedProductName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get saved product name.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.SetLastVerifyAllInstancesStatus(System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the VerifyAll instances status.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.GetLastVerifyAllInstancesStatus(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the last VerifyAll instances status.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Returns PASS or FAIL for the last VerifyAll status.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.SetLastSuccessVerifyAllInstancesLocation(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the last success VerifyAll instances location code.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.GetLastSuccessVerifyAllInstancesLocation(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the last success VerifyAll instances location code.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Last success VerifyAll instances location code.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.SetLastSuccessVerifyAllInstancesProductName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the last success VerifyAll instances product name.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.InitService.IInitService.GetLastSuccessVerifyAllInstancesProductName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the last success VerifyAll instances product name.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Last success VerifyAll instances product name.

member.summary: Save current process type from SCVars.SC_CURRENT_PROCESS_TYPE.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get saved process type value.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Set the last success VerifyAll instances process type code.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get the last success VerifyAll instances process type code.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Last success VerifyAll instances process type code.

member.summary: Save current process step from SCVars.SC_CURRENT_PROCESS_STEP.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
